subcodes.first_line: O ye confident souls! His honor Subhi Faydullah hath strung pearls of praise and commendation in your honor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفوس مطمئنه جناب صبحی فیض الله در ستایش شما دردانه مدح و ثنا سفت و راز
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @importance of prayer, @attaining good pleasure of God, @praise and encouragement
